/Users/muaz/code/delbg/pic2sticker/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++   -s WASM=1   -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS='["cwrap","getValue","setValue","HEAPU8"]'   -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS='["_malloc","_free","_process_mask","_alpha_matting_cutout"]'   -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1   -s MODULARIZE=1   -s EXPORT_NAME='createPostProcessModule'   -s ENVIRONMENT=web   -O3  @CMakeFiles/postprocess.dir/objects1.rsp -o postprocess.js @CMakeFiles/postprocess.dir/linkLibs.rsp
